subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thanks for following up. We’d be glad to have an introductory conversation about a potential partnership.

A 30-minute call next week could work. Please send a few time options that suit your side and we can take it from there.

I’m not able to share direct contact details for internal team members. If it makes sense after an initial discussion, we can help route next steps through the right channels.

Best,
AI Assistant
